channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Dynabook's newest laptop has a 4-year warranty, a swappable battery, a weight of under 1 kg, and even a LAN port
item.description: Dynabook Portégé Z40L-N offers AI-powered productivity with Intel Core Ultra, ensuring smooth performance for professionals on the go.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: New delivery robot can haul 2,200 pounds of your stuff
item.description: WeRide's unmanned electric delivery van, the Robovan W5, has 194 cubic feet of cargo space and can carry payloads up to about 2,205 pounds
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Billions of cherished photos at risk; only a third of Americans back up their precious pics to the cloud
item.description: Americans take billions of photos, yet only a small fraction make it into printed albums, risking future loss.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Helping DOGE cut waste
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Spotify is leaning hard into video podcasts. Here’s how creators are adapting
item.description: Spotify just opened up a new stream of revenue for podcasters. That is, if they’re uploading video. What was once an audio-first medium, podcasting is now increasingly filmed and produced. That started on YouTube, which is now racking up one billion podcast viewers a month.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Two Bay Area counties lead the state in electric vehicle sales
item.description: Santa Clara and Marin counties held their position among leaders in zero-emission vehicle sales across California in 2024, according to new state data.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Rodriguez, The Mercury News

item.title: Scientists date remains of an ancient child that resembles both humans and Neanderthals
item.description: Scientists have dated the skeleton of an ancient child that caused a stir when it was first discovered because it carries features from both humans and Neanderthals.
item.dc:creator: Adithi Ramakrishnan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: i2CAT promueve el primer laboratorio abierto europeo de investigación 6G en órbita baja
item.description: El centro de investigación i2CAT ha anunciado en el marco del Mobile World Congress la puesta en marcha del primer laboratorio en órbita terrestre baja de Europa (LEO, por sus siglas en inglés).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Alibaba says its new AI model rivals DeepSeeks’s R-1, OpenAI’s o1
item.description: Alibaba Cloud on Thursday launched QwQ-32B, a compact reasoning model built on its latest large language model (LLM), Qwen2.5-32b, one it says delivers performance comparable to other large cutting edge models, including Chinese rival DeepSeek and OpenAI’s o1, with only 32 billion parameters.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Albania shuts down TikTok for a year amid concerns over violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — The Albanian Cabinet decided on Thursday to shut down TikTok for 12 months, blaming the popular video-sharing platform for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Social Security Administration bans reading 'general news' at work
item.description: The Social Security Administration (SSA) has banned reading “general news” websites at work, The Hill has learned.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Siemens announces $285 million investment in US manufacturing
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Siemens plans to invest $285 million in manufacturing in the United States, the tech company said Thursday, including two new facilities in California and Texas. The U.S. is the largest market for the company. The recent investments in the Siemens' U.S.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump says he will 'probably' extend TikTok ban deadline if deal isn't reached in time
item.description: President Trump on Thursday suggested he would consider extending the deadline for a ban on TikTok for a second time if a deal isn't reached, stating there is "a lot of interest" in the video-sharing platform.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Senate Democrat slams Trump's 'grift' meme coins
item.description: Sen. Chris Murphy (D-Conn.) slammed President Trump for his launch of a meme coin in January, suggesting it might be the "biggest White House corruption in a century.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Microsoft-OpenAI investigation closed by UK regulators
item.description: The UK’s Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) spent a great deal of time deciding whether it should investigate Microsoft’s investment in OpenAI as a potential merger situation, but in the end, decided to open and close the investigation within 24 hours.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump calls CHIPS Act ‘horrible,’ wants to defund it
item.description: In his address to Congress last night, President Donald J. Trump called the CHIPS Act “horrible,” and said whatever money hasn’t been spent should now be used to reduce the national debt. The CHIPS Act, enacted into law in 2022 under then-President Joseph R. Biden Jr.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How to boost Python program performance with Zig
item.description: Python might not be the fastest of languages, but it has many advantages. Users enjoy Python’s convenience and development speed, as well as its broad ecosystem of libraries. Something else people appreciate about Python is how it bridges language ecosystems.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: DECATUR, Ga. (AP) — Outside Beacon Hill Middle School in the Atlanta suburb of Decatur, like along hundreds of roadsides across Georgia, the unblinking eye of a camera tickets drivers who speed through a school zone.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minnesota considers blocking 'nudify' apps that use AI to make explicit images without consent
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Molly Kelley was stunned to discover in June that someone she knew had used widely available “nudification” technology to create highly realistic and sexually explicit videos and images of her, using family photos that were posted on social media.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Netskope expands SASE footprint, bolsters AI and automation
item.description: Netskope is expanding its global presence by adding multiple regions to its NewEdge carrier-grade infrastructure, which now includes more than 75 locations to ensure processing remains close to end users.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Tariffs for now won’t impact IT organizations
item.description: The impact of tariffs by the Trump Administration on semiconductors from Taiwan is so far not cause for alarm, according to one analyst.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Casey Anthony, mom acquitted in toddler's death, joins TikTok
item.description: Casey Anthony, a Florida mother who was acquitted of murder charges in the death of her 2-year-old daughter Caylee, has joined TikTok to brand herself as a "legal advocate.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, NewsNation

item.title: Improving intelligent document processing with generative AI
item.description: One of the earliest digital transformation drivers was digitalization, in which organizations converted paper-based processes to digitized workflows. In ideal circumstances, paper documents became web or mobile forms, and workflows replaced handoffs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Tariffs an 'expensive game to play': Powerteam International CEO
item.description: Tariffs are going to be an "expensive game to play," Bill Walsh, CEO and founder of Powerteam International, said.
item.dc:creator: Connell McShane, NewsNation

item.title: UK data protection watchdog investigating how TikTok uses children's personal data
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The U.K.'s data protection watchdog said Monday that it's investigating how TikTok uses the personal information of teenagers to deliver content recommendations to them when they use the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump announces US crypto reserve
item.description: President Trump announced Sunday that the U.S. would be creating a crypto reserve, to boost the growing industry.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation
